%_where.19 (Arg_0.33: pred[], Arg_1.33: s32[], Arg_2.6: s32[]) -> s32[] {
  %Arg_0.33 = pred[] parameter(0)
  %Arg_1.33 = s32[] parameter(1)
  %Arg_2.6 = s32[] parameter(2)
  ROOT %select_n.6 = s32[] select(%Arg_0.33, %Arg_1.33, %Arg_2.6), metadata={op_name="select_n"}
}

%remainder.20 (Arg_0.34: s32[1], Arg_1.34: s32[]) -> s32[1] {
  %Arg_0.34 = s32[1]{0} parameter(0)
  %Arg_1.34 = s32[] parameter(1)
  %constant.114 = s32[] constant(0)
  %eq.1 = pred[] compare(%Arg_1.34, %constant.114), direction=EQ, metadata={op_name="eq"}
  %constant.113 = s32[] constant(1)
  %jit__where_.1 = s32[] call(%eq.1, %constant.113, %Arg_1.34), to_apply=%_where.19, metadata={op_name="jit(_where)"}
  %rem.2 = s32[1]{0} reshape(%jit__where_.1), metadata={op_name="rem"}
  %rem.3 = s32[1]{0} remainder(%Arg_0.34, %rem.2), metadata={op_name="rem"}
  %constant.112 = s32[1]{0} constant({0})
  %lt.7 = pred[1]{0} compare(%rem.3, %constant.112), direction=LT, metadata={op_name="lt"}
  %lt.8 = pred[] compare(%jit__where_.1, %constant.114), direction=LT, metadata={op_name="lt"}
  %ne.4 = pred[1]{0} reshape(%lt.8), metadata={op_name="ne"}
  %ne.5 = pred[1]{0} compare(%lt.7, %ne.4), direction=NE, metadata={op_name="ne"}
  %ne.3 = pred[1]{0} compare(%rem.3, %constant.112), direction=NE, metadata={op_name="ne"}
  %and.1 = pred[1]{0} and(%ne.5, %ne.3), metadata={op_name="and"}
  %add.13 = s32[1]{0} reshape(%jit__where_.1), metadata={op_name="add"}
  %add.14 = s32[1]{0} add(%rem.3, %add.13), metadata={op_name="add"}
  ROOT %select_n.8 = s32[1]{0} select(%and.1, %add.14, %rem.3), metadata={op_name="select_n"}
}
